support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com

Work with us

Need a website or an app? Let’s build it.

We don’t only make our own apps — we take on a handful of client projects too. The same care, craft and privacy-first thinking, applied to whatever you have in mind.

Start a project What we build

What we build

Two things, done properly

Whether it lives on the App Store or in a browser, we design and build the whole thing — and keep the quality bar exactly where it is for our own products.

iPhone apps

Native iOS apps built in SwiftUI — from a first sketch to a finished app on the App Store. The same craft, speed and privacy-first approach that goes into our own apps.

  • Concept, UX and interface design
  • SwiftUI development for iPhone
  • App Store submission & review
  • Offline-first, private by default

Websites

Fast, modern websites that look right on every screen — marketing sites, landing pages and app companion sites like this one. Clean, accessible and easy to grow.

  • Visual design & copy direction
  • Responsive, hand-built front-end
  • SEO, performance & analytics
  • Hosting and domain setup

How we work

What you can count on

Design that fits

No templates. Every project gets an interface shaped around your goal and the people who use it.

Fast & polished

Performance is a feature. Quick to load, smooth to use, and refined down to the small details.

Built to last

Clean, maintainable code and honest choices — so what we ship keeps working long after launch.

Privacy by design

We collect only what a product truly needs, and we are transparent about it. The default is your data, on your device.

The process

From idea to launch

A simple, transparent path — you always know where things stand.

    01

    Discovery

    A short call to understand your idea, your users and the scope. You get a clear plan, timeline and quote.

    02

    Design

    Wireframes and a visual direction to react to. We refine together until it feels right before a line of code is written.

    03

    Build

    Development in focused sprints with regular previews, so you always see progress and can steer along the way.

    04

    Launch & beyond

    App Store submission or go-live, plus the aftercare to keep things running smoothly once you are out in the world.

Let’s talk

Have a project in mind?

Tell us what you’re thinking — even a rough idea is enough to start. We reply within two business days and we’ll be honest about whether we’re the right fit.

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com See our own apps
